_comment: Committed snapshot of public name_anchors (key -> emotional anchor line). Source of truth for the home-screen widget's daily content. Regenerate from Supabase with: dart run scripts/gen_widget_catalog.dart --refresh-snapshot (reads via the public anon key; no service role). See spec §10.1/§10.2.
ad-darr: Even what causes you pain is under His authority.
al-adl: His justice is exact — and woven with mercy.
al-afuw: His forgiveness erases — it doesn't just cover.
al-ahad: He is unique — there is nothing else like Him.
al-akhir: He will be there after everything ends.
al-aleem: He knows what you cannot put into words.
al-ali: He sees your situation from above — all of it.
al-awwal: He was there before anything you know.
al-azeem: He is greater than the thing that is overwhelming you.
al-azeez: He cannot be overcome — and neither can what He holds.
al-badi: He creates beauty that has no precedent.
al-baith: He raises what has died — including in you.
al-baqi: When everything else fades, He remains.
al-bari: He brings into being what did not exist before.
al-barr: His kindness toward you is constant.
al-basir: He sees everything others overlook in you.
al-batin: He is closer than your inner thoughts.
al-fattah: Doors will open that you cannot open yourself.
al-ghaffar: You are not defined by your worst moments.
al-ghafur: His forgiveness covers what no one else can see.
al-ghaniyy: He does not need anything from you — and yet He wants you.
al-hadi: You will be guided to where you need to be.
al-hafeez: He guards what you cannot protect yourself.
al-hakam: He is the Judge who will set every wrong right.
al-hakim: Nothing in your life is wasted.
al-haleem: He is patient with you in a way no one else is.
al-hameed: Every praise eventually points back to Him.
al-haqq: He is the one Reality everything else points to.
al-haseeb: He accounts for every kindness you have ever offered.
al-hayy: He is alive in a way nothing else is.
al-jabbar: He mends what has been broken in you.
al-jaleel: His majesty is a refuge, not a distance.
al-jami: He will gather what has been scattered.
al-kabeer: Nothing in your life is too big for Him.
al-karim: He gives generously, without you having to deserve it.
al-khabir: He knows your interior life completely.
al-khafid: He humbles what has grown too big.
al-khaliq: You were made on purpose, by the One who knows what He's doing.
al-latif: He works in the details you cannot see.
al-majeed: His glory is gentle as much as it is grand.
al-majid: His nobility expresses itself as generosity toward you.
al-malik: He is sovereign over what feels out of your hands.
al-mani: What He withholds, He withholds for your protection.
al-matin: There is a steadiness beneath your feet.
al-muakhkhir: What He delays is not what He has denied.
al-mubdi: Every beginning has come from Him.
al-mughni: He enriches whoever He chooses to enrich.
al-muhaymin: He watches over your life like a guardian, not a critic.
al-muhsi: Not a single thing about you escapes His count.
al-muhyi: He gives life to what feels lifeless.
al-muid: He restores what has been undone.
al-muizz: He grants honor that no one can take from you.
al-mumeet: Death is in His hands — and so is the life that follows.
al-mumin: He is the source of every safety you have ever felt.
al-muqaddim: He brings forward what is meant for you in His time.
al-muqeet: He sustains you in ways you don't see.
al-muqsit: He gives every soul exactly what is fair.
al-muqtadir: His power has no resistance it cannot overcome.
al-musawwir: Every detail of you was shaped on purpose.
al-mutaali: He is above every limitation you can imagine.
al-mutakabbir: Greatness belongs to Him alone — and that is a relief.
al-muzill: He humbles whom He wills — paired with Al-Muizz, who honors whom He wills.
al-qabid: When provision is withheld, He is still at work.
al-qadir: He is able to do what looks impossible.
al-qahhar: Nothing can finally defeat what He has chosen.
al-qawi: His strength is available to you.
al-qayyum: He is the only constant when everything shifts.
al-quddus: There is a purity available to your heart.
al-wadud: You are wired for deep, lasting love.
al-wahhab: He gives gifts you would never think to ask for.
al-wahid: He alone is One — and that is enough.
al-wajid: Nothing He wants is beyond His reach.
al-wakil: You can let go — He has it.
al-wali: He governs your affairs whether you see Him or not.
al-waliyy: He is your closest ally — closer than any friend.
al-wasi: His mercy is wider than you can imagine.
an-nafi: Every benefit you have ever received has come from Him.
an-nur: His light finds you even in the dark.
ar-rafi: He raises what has been lowered.
ar-rahman: You are held by infinite mercy.
ar-raqeeb: He is attentive to you, not just aware of you.
ar-rasheed: He guides you toward what is genuinely right for you.
ar-rauf: His tenderness toward you is gentler than you know.
ar-razzaq: Your provision has already been written.
as-sabur: The wait is not a sign that He has forgotten you.
as-salam: Peace is a person you can return to.
as-samad: He is the only One who can truly fill what is empty.
as-sami: Every word you speak to Him lands.
ash-shafi: Healing — of every kind — is in His hands.
ash-shahid: He is a witness to everything you endure.
ash-shakur: Every act of gratitude multiplies what you have.
at-tawwab: The door of return is always open.
az-zahir: Signs of Him are everywhere, if you look.
dhul-jalali-wal-ikram: He is both awe-inspiring and overwhelmingly generous.
malik-ul-mulk: All ownership belongs to Him alone.
